message:
test(e2e): Update basket tests with correct selectors and add accessibility tests

- Updated all basket button selectors from deprecated /save/i and /added/i
  to current aria-labels: /add to basket/i and /already in basket/i
- Added new "Basket - Keyboard Accessibility" test section:
  - Tab + Enter keyboard navigation test
  - Focus state verification test
- Added new "Basket - Mobile Swipe Actions" test section:
  - Swipe right gesture to add to basket on mobile viewport
- Improved test descriptions and comments to match current PromptCard
  implementation which uses icon-only buttons with aria-labels
- Updated basket-export.spec.ts with matching selector updates
- Fixed sidebar close button selector to use aria-label "Close basket"
- Fixed remove item button selector to use aria-label with "Remove"

Closes: jeffreysprompts.com-q4dz

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
